channel.title: stayhome on Zdravko Dugonjić
channel.description: Recent content in stayhome on Zdravko Dugonjić

item.title: In the Beginning was the Isolation
item.description:
A long time ago, I thought this could be a good idea…but as always there is no time. No time. Then this happened.

Experts say this is the largest pandemic since 1918. Countries around the globe are under lockdown for a few months. Everyone is in isolation and now you have to fill all that time. Then this site comes to life…
